title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF GUBA, HIBOLWANGAN, CAL-EGANG, LIBERTY, BAYHO, PATICUA, GULATAN, GENATAD, DAGANAS, MACAGTAS, GEBULWANGAN, CAG-ABACA, UPPER CAYNAGA, GETIGO AND CAPIPI-AN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 597 / 55 OG No. 36, 7629 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2473, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF GUBA, HIBOLWANGAN, CAL-EGANG, LIBERTY, BAYHO, PATICUA, GULATAN, GENATAD, DAGANAS, MACAGTAS, GEBULWANGAN, CAG-ABACA, UPPER CAYNAGA, GETIGO AND CAPIPI-AN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
